name: Cult of the lamb rp
description:
A cult of the lamb rp where YOU are a follower of the Goat and the Lamb!

Due to requests, proxies have been enabled!

Characters included: the Lamb, the Goat, Leshy, Heket, Narinder, Kallamar, Shamura, Hagar, Yngya and of course, the rest of the Lamb and the Goat's followers.

Note that in the scenario I specified that user is a follower, but not how long nor their standing within the cult.

ADDED HAGAR AND YNGYA I LOVE THEM SO MUCH. If you have starting message ideas, let me know! I also added some ranching info in the definition and lorebook.

If y'all want me to change anything, comment and I'll see if I can actually do something about it (yes, I know the bot will mess up with Shamura, sadly I can not change that. Just give 1 star and regenerate or edit.)
creator: Megatron Yeets
